---
name: no-attribution
description: Use before every commit, before opening a PR, and before creating any user-visible file (README, LICENSE, package.json, docs, comments). Scans for and removes any mention of Claude, Anthropic, AI generation, or co-author trailers. The only author is MNRV.
---

## Purpose

The DeNotenman codebase must contain zero attribution to any AI tool, assistant, or generation service. The only author is MNRV.

## Checklist (run in this order)

### 1. Full-repo grep

Run from repo root:

```bash
grep -rniE \
  "claude|anthropic|ai[- ]generated|generated by|co-?authored-?by|openai|gpt-?[0-9]|copilot|cursor|codeium|windsurf|antigravity" \
  --exclude-dir=node_modules \
  --exclude-dir=.git \
  --exclude-dir=.next \
  --exclude-dir=dist \
  --exclude-dir=build \
  --exclude-dir=.turbo
```

Any hit that is not a legitimate product reference (e.g. a dependency name in `package-lock.json` is fine, a comment saying "generated by Prisma" is fine) must be removed.

### 2. File-specific checks

- `package.json` (root and every app/package):
  - `"author": "MNRV"`
  - `"contributors"` field absent
  - `"license": "UNLICENSED"` (proprietary) or `"SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE"`
- `LICENSE`: header `Copyright (c) <year> MNRV`. No other name.
- `README.md`: no "Made with", no "Powered by AI", no credits section mentioning tooling.
- Source file headers: none. No banner comments.
- Git config for the repo must set `user.name = MNRV` and `user.email = <owner-provided>`.

### 3. Commit trailers

```bash
git log --all --format='%B' | grep -iE "co-?authored-?by|generated|assisted-by"
```

Any hit → rewrite history with `git filter-repo` or `git rebase -i` before pushing. Never force-push shared branches without coordination — fix at commit time instead.

### 4. Comment cleanup

```bash
grep -rniE "// .*(claude|anthropic|ai|gpt)" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --include="*.js"
```

### 5. Docs

- `docs/**/*.md`: same grep, same rule.
- Architecture diagrams exported as SVG: open and search for text layers referencing tools.

## Output format

Return a report:

```
no-attribution scan: <clean|N findings>

Findings:
  <file>:<line>: <matched text>
```

If clean, say "clean" and nothing else. If findings, list them and refuse to proceed until fixed.

## Do not

- Do not flag legitimate library names (e.g. `@anthropic-ai/sdk` as a dependency is not allowed in this project, but if a future feature needs it, that's a consensus vote).
- Do not rewrite files yourself — report the findings so the owning agent fixes them.
